Container.Name: qt-autotrader
Container.Overview: QT Auto-Trader: self-hosted momentum trading bot for stocks and crypto via Alpaca. Paper-trading first, all configuration through the web UI. GPLv3.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the QT web interface

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: DIRECTION MATTERS: Host Path = a folder on your server (e.g. /mnt/user/appdata/qt-autotrader); Container Path must be exactly /data. Do NOT swap them — an inverted mapping makes the app write to throwaway storage and you lose config, keys and trade history on the next update. This folder holds the database, encrypted API keys and trade history. BACK IT UP. See docs/data-persistence.md.

Config.Name: Allow Leverage (DANGEROUS)
Config.Description: Leave false. Setting true does NOT enable leverage - it only makes the option visible inside the app, where enabling still requires typed confirmation. Leverage multiplies losses; see docs/how-it-works.md.
